# Diablo4Storage.SharedPayloads property

The shared-payload de-duplication mapping (`Base\CoreTOCSharedPayloadsMapping.dat`, magic `0xABBA0003`), parsed on first use. Empty if the file is absent.

```csharp
public SharedPayloadMapping SharedPayloads { get; }
```
